name: AMERICAN EAGLE OUTFITTERS INC
business: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. is a leading global specialty retailer with a portfolio of beloved apparel brands. We sell directly to consumers through our retail channels, which includes online, stores, and concession-based shops-within-shops. We offer casual, comfortable, timeless outfitting and high-quality products under the American Eagle brand, and intimates, apparel, activewear, and swim collections under the Aerie and OFFLINE by Aerie brands.

exposures.sentence: American Eagle Outfitters, Inc. is a leading global specialty retailer with a portfolio of beloved apparel brands.
We sell directly to consumers through our retail channels, which includes online, stores, and concession-based shops-within-shops.

Our distribution network is fully omni-channel and services both stores and digital businesses.

catalysts.event: Opening approximately 5 to 10 American Eagle stores and 25 to 40 Aerie and OFFLINE stores during Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: the planned opening of approximately five to 10 American Eagle stores and approximately 25 to 40 Aerie and OFFLINE stores, which will be a mix of stand-alone and Aerie side-by-sides, during Fiscal 2026

catalysts.event: Remodeling approximately 60 American Eagle and Aerie stores in the U.S. and Canada during Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: the anticipated selection of approximately 60 American Eagle and Aerie stores in the United States ("U.S.") and Canada for remodeling during Fiscal 2026

catalysts.event: Potential closure of approximately 25 to 30 American Eagle stores at lease expiration during Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: the potential closure of approximately 25 to 30 American Eagle stores at the expiration of their lease term, primarily in North America, during Fiscal 2026

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures of $250 to $260 million in Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: For Fiscal 2026, we expect capital expenditures to be in the range of $250 to 260 million related to the continued support of our expansion efforts, stores, information technology upgrades to support growth and investments in e-commerce, as well as to support and enhance our supply chain.

catalysts.event: Continue to increase number of licensed locations in Fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: During Fiscal 2026, we plan to continue to increase the number of locations under license agreements or similar arrangements as part of our disciplined approach to global expansion.
